PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-22-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: June Wiyrick Flores, via ZOOM, for Francis N. Penna, Jr., Petitioner.

At the outset, the court queries Ms. Flores whether Mr. Penna intends to sell the real property in San Francisco. Counsel reports that her client initially contemplated selling the property but at this point he is undecided. The court advises counsel that it is inclined to grant the petition with minimum bond and limited authority, accordingly.

No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated November 10, 2015, admitted to probate in New York, is admitted to probate in California. Francis Penner is appointed as the Executor of the estate with limited authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for July 12, 2022, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Neves. Not reported.
